query:
SELECT 
  u.name,
  r.weekKey,
  r.decision,
  r.rescueAttempted,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(r.blockers, '$[0].criterion')) as blocker1,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(r.blockers, '$[0].detail')) as blocker1_detail,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(r.blockers, '$[1].criterion')) as blocker2
FROM repDigestGateResults r
JOIN users u ON u.id = r.userId
WHERE r.weekKey = '2026-W22'
ORDER BY r.decision DESC, u.name;
